item.title: DEBT: Move HapticFeedback to EMApp or add macOS no-op path
item.intent: EMCore must compile identically on all platforms — an iOS-only type with no macOS fallback breaks the platform-agnostic contract
item.description: HapticFeedback in EMCore is wrapped in #if canImport(UIKit) with no macOS implementation. The trigger() method is invisible on macOS, which means any EMCore consumer calling it won't compile on macOS. Either move HapticFeedback to EMApp (platform-specific module) or add a no-op macOS implementation so the public API is consistent across platforms.
acceptanceCriteria: HapticFeedback.trigger() compiles and runs on both iOS and macOS
macOS implementation is a no-op (no crash, no error)
